pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Import all packages, check GPU, load Gemma 2B tokenizer (not full model).
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: All imports succeed, GPU detected with >= 24GB VRAM.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Train probes for first-letter + city-continent only at L12 and L24 (4 probes instead of 16). Use 100 entities. Check if L24 gives F1 > 0.80 for both.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: First-letter F1 > 0.90 at L24. City-continent F1 > 0.70 at L24.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Measure first-letter absorption at L24-16k only (single SAE). Use first 100 test words x 50 contexts. Check rate is within 10pp of iter_008 baseline (34.5%).
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Absorption rate computed. Rate within 10pp of 34.5% (iter_008 baseline at L24-16k). Bootstrap CI computed.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Measure city-continent absorption at L24-16k only. Use 100 entities x 50 contexts. Compare with first-letter rate.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Absorption rate computed for city-continent. Permutation test vs first-letter computed.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Hedging decomposition for first-letter at L24-16k: classify FNs as absorbed/hedged/persistent. Use existing absorption results.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Decomposition computed. Absorbed vs hedged fractions reported.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Attempt activation patching on 5 city-continent absorption pairs (if available from pilot absorption measurement). Zero child feature, check parent probe recovery at L24. Control: random feature.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: At least 3 pairs processed. Recovery rate computed for child-zeroed vs control. Direction of effect consistent with first-letter patching.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Test benign/pathological diagnostic on 5 first-letter absorption instances. Ablate parent direction from child decoder, measure logit change. Use iter_008 activation patching results to identify pairs.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Logit changes computed for 5 instances. Distribution shows spread (not all zero or all large). Random direction control computed.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Load BatchTopK-16k and Matryoshka SAEs at L12. Measure first-letter absorption only. Compare with JumpReLU-16k at L12.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: All 3 architectures loaded successfully. Absorption rates computed for first-letter at L12. Rates within 10pp of iter_008 values.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Compute cos_sim, co-occurrence, R_parent for 10 first-letter parent-child pairs from iter_008 activation patching data. Compute Spearman rho with observed absorption.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Per-pair predictors computed for 10 pairs. Spearman rho and p-value reported.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Load iter_001 threshold sensitivity JSON, parse 5x4 grid, generate summary.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Grid parsed, CV computed, summary table generated.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Compute T(G) for first-letter at L24. Compare with observed absorption. Single hierarchy quick check.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: T(G) value computed. Comparison with observed rate reported.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Load iter_008 GAS and CMI results. Generate clean negative result summaries.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: All negative result summaries generated with specific metrics.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Aggregate pilot results into mini-consolidation. Check hypothesis verdict directions match expectations.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: All available hypothesis verdicts summarized. Writing gate assessment provided.

GO_conditions: Probe training succeeds with F1 >= 0.70 for at least 2 hierarchies
First-letter absorption rate computable and within 15pp of iter_008 baseline
Cross-domain absorption rate computable for at least 1 RAVEL hierarchy
NOGO_conditions: All RAVEL probes below F1=0.60 (data quality insufficient)
SAE loading fails for primary SAEs (environment broken)
First-letter absorption rate dramatically different from iter_008 (>20pp, suggesting pipeline bug)
GPU OOM on basic operations (hardware insufficient)
CONDITIONAL_GO: Benign/pathological diagnostic too noisy (proceed with distribution reporting instead of binary)
Rate-distortion rho < 0.3 in pilot (proceed, report as negative result)
BatchTopK/Matryoshka SAEs unavailable (proceed with JumpReLU-only comparison)
